title: Dashboard Broadcast Service
description: Create DashboardBroadcastService : BackgroundService. Consumes IDashboardEventBus, batches events for 100ms, publishes latest snapshot via IHubContext<AgentHub> using DashboardHubEvents.SnapshotUpdated. Decouples AgentBackgroundService from direct hub context dependency. Reference: blazor-dashboard-improvement-v2.md Section 4
